elements.text: You are at the doctor’s office and they ask you if you are having any COVID symptoms. They list headaches as a possible symptom, something you have been experiencing but didn’t recognize as an issue, and that scares you because you remember how sick your friends got with COVID. You remember that you can focus on your health and rest until you feel...

elements.name: Headache at the Doctor's Office_Physical Health_puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
